title: The Steamroller and the Violin
writer: S. Bakhmetyeva, Andrei Konchalovsky, Andrei Tarkovsky
actors: Igor Fomchenko, Vladimir Zamanskiy, Natalya Arkhangelskaya
plot: Seven-year-old Sasha practices violin every day to satisfy the ambition of his parents. Already withdrawn as a result of his routines, Sasha quickly regains confidence when he accidentally meets and befriends worker Sergei, who wo...
